info.title: specflow-plus-license
info.description:
Copyright © SpecFlow Team
about         Displays version information about the SpecFlow+ Licensing tool
as well as registration information about your license.
register      Registers a seat license on the current user.
unregister    Unregisters SpecRun for the current user.
help          Display more information on a specific command.
version       Display version information.

commands.name: about
commands.description:
Displays version information about the SpecFlow+ Licensing tool
as well as registration information about your license.

commands.name: register
commands.description: Registers a seat license on the current user.

options.name: --issuedTo
options.description:
Required. The exact 'issued to' value that was specified for
the purchase.

commands.description: Unregisters SpecRun for the current user.
